title: Seeds, Origins, Paths, Budgets, and Kill Policy · Contract Triage
summary: A preserved Go crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, transport, body, tokenizer, goquery, frontier, goroutine, Colly callback, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first broken invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in testable bounded crawl charter and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected page class, policy revision, contact, start window, and expiry.
Define allowed schemes, ASCII hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and embedded resources under deny-by-default policy.
Express methods, path prefixes, queries, fragments, pagination, downloads, forms, and content types as deterministic admission rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Seed Record
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go team handles case 8272 during an owner-approved community information audit. Build deterministic Go evidence to admit seeds through owner, origin, path, method, query, budget, kill, and contact policy; every URL, body, tree, record, frontier transition, and report row retains causal identity; then change one content version, metadata, accessibility, resource, browser-service, or report condition without overclaiming. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected page class, policy revision, contact, start window, and expiry.

Inspect the Seed Record trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Seed Record.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected page class, policy revision, contact, start window, and expiry. For Authorized site auditing and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Seed Record, keep Seed Record connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
